scripts.test:unit:build: tsc --ignoreConfig --pretty false --target es2020 --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --types node --lib ES2023,DOM --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-test src/lib/midi/types.ts src/lib/midi/webMidi.ts src/lib/transport/types.ts src/lib/transport/transportClock.ts src/lib/transport/transportClock.test.ts src/lib/scheduler/types.ts src/lib/scheduler/midiEventScheduler.ts src/lib/scheduler/midiEventScheduler.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:clean && npm run test:unit:build && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node --test test_webMidi.test.mjs .tmp-test/transport/transportClock.test.js .tmp-test/scheduler/midiEventScheduler.test.js && npm run test:unit:clean
